Cavaliers Win Game 1 vs Raptors 126-113 | YES (Cavs lead series 1-0) | HIGH confidence**  
Cleveland Cavaliers dominated Toronto Raptors 126-113 in their playoff opener, leading at halftime and surging in the third quarter to take a 1-0 series lead, with Game 2 set for Monday in Cleveland[3][4]. This strong start reinforces Cavaliers as title contenders, impacting series win markets[2][4].
